default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review monthly performance and align on growth priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Organic traffic is up 15% MoM** due to the CDT code launch. The new "dental hygienist salary" pages are also ranking on page one, creating a powerful programmatic growth engine.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**The immediate priority is converting existing traffic.** The team will update CTAs on relevant blog posts to promote the new RCM (dental billing) service, aiming to drive high-value demos.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**To maximize programmatic impact,** Jakub will find new content opportunities ("Jakub's Insight Corner") and investigate the indexing of the 2,000+ salary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**A new content approval interface** was demoed to streamline Nate's workflow, but Nate confirmed the current Slack-based process is already highly efficient.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Topics

### Monthly Performance Review (October)

  - [**Organic Traffic:** +15% MoM, driven by the CDT code launch.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Blog Traffic:** +6% MoM, with 5.11k clicks from SERPs.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Stagnant (\~30 clicks/week).](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The target audience (dental professionals) has low LLM adoption, making this a secondary focus.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Leads:** Stagnant MoM, but growing QoQ.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Top-performing pages:** "Dental Narratives for Insurance Providers" and "Dental Office Voicemail Greetings."](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Strategic Shift: Programmatic Content & Conversions

  - [**Programmatic Content Engine:** The CDT code launch proves programmatic content drives "step-function" growth.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**New Launch:** 2,000+ "dental hygienist salary in \[city\]" pages are already ranking on page one.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Goal:** Find more programmatic opportunities to replicate this success.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**Conversion Optimization:** The immediate priority is converting existing traffic into high-value leads for the new RCM (dental billing) service.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Action:** Update CTAs on relevant blog posts to promote the RCM service and its dedicated landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a high-impact, low-effort change, as the traffic is already present.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### Technical Deep Dive: Programmatic Indexing

  - [**Problem:** The new salary pages have an indexing gap.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Finding:** 155 of the 2,000+ salary pages are not yet indexed (7.75% gap).](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a healthy rate for a large, new programmatic launch.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create and link index pages in the footer.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Action:** Build a central index page for the salary pages (e.g., by state/city) and add a link to it in the site footer.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This improves site architecture and ensures Google's crawlers discover and index all pages regularly.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

### New Content Approval Interface

  - [**Demo:** Jessalynn demoed a new client-facing interface designed to streamline content approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
      - [**Features:** A simplified view with tabs for "Ready for Review" articles and one-click approval buttons.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Automation:** A Slack bot will notify Nate when articles are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Nate confirmed the current Slack-based process is already efficient for his workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Identify new programmatic content opportunities for "Jakub's Insight Corner."](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Update CTAs on relevant blog posts to promote the new RCM service.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Teero:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [Create a central index page for the "dental hygienist salary" pages and add it to the site footer.](https://fathom.video/share/2Y_uzK7Ds7ZVdY9TdXK4qunexjV9tEBJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
